problem id: b2bdef43
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01000000 -> 11111111
  11001010 -> 01111111
  00001010 -> 01111111
  00111110 -> 01111111
  01111011 -> 10111111
  00101000 -> 11111111
  00000101 -> 00111111
  01111111 -> 10111111

query: 11110010
predicted answer: 01111111
